general.name: mos_target_mastar_goodvisits_parquet
general.description: Summary file of all visits of stars included in MaNGA Stellar Library.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mastar_goodvisits.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

mjd.name: mjd
mjd.description: Modified Julian Date for this visit.

ifura.name: ifura
ifura.description: Right Ascension of the center of the IFU.

ifudec.name: ifudec
ifudec.description: Declination of the center of the IFU.

ra.name: ra
ra.description: Right Ascension for this object at the time given by the EPOCH column (Equinox J2000).

dec.name: dec
dec.description: Declination for this object at the time given by the EPOCH column (Equinox J2000).

epoch.name: epoch
epoch.description: Epoch of the astrometry (which is approximate for some catalogs).

psfmag_1.name: psfmag_1
psfmag_1.description: PSF magnitude in the first band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.

psfmag_2.name: psfmag_2
psfmag_2.description: PSF magnitude in the second band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.

psfmag_3.name: psfmag_3
psfmag_3.description: PSF magnitude in the third band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.

psfmag_4.name: psfmag_4
psfmag_4.description: PSF magnitude in the fourth band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.

psfmag_5.name: psfmag_5
psfmag_5.description: PSF magnitude in the fifth band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.

exptime.name: exptime
exptime.description: Median exposure time for all exposures on this visit.

nexp_visit.name: nexp_visit
nexp_visit.description: Total number of exposures during this visit. This column was named 'NEXP' in DR15/16.

nvelgood.name: nvelgood
nvelgood.description: Number of exposures (from all visits of this PLATE-IFUDESIGN) with good velocity measurements.

heliov.name: heliov
heliov.description: Median heliocentric velocity of all exposures on all visits that yield good velocity measurements. This is used to shift the spectra to the rest frame.

v_errcode.name: v_errcode
v_errcode.description: Error code for HELIOV. Zero is good, nonzero is bad.

heliov_visit.name: heliov_visit
heliov_visit.description: Median heliocentric velocity of good exposures from only this visit, rather than from all visits.

v_errcode_visit.name: v_errcode_visit
v_errcode_visit.description: Error code for HELIOV_VISIT. Zero is good, nonzero is bad.

velvarflag.name: velvarflag
velvarflag.description: Flag indicating the significant variation of the heliocentric velocity from visit to visit. A value of 1 means the variation is beyond 3-sigma between at least two of the visits. A value of 0 means all variations between pairs of visits are less than 3-sigma.

dv_maxsig.name: dv_maxsig
dv_maxsig.description: Maximum significance in velocity variation between pairs of visits.

bprperr_sp.name: bprperr_sp
bprperr_sp.description: Uncertainty in the synthetic Bp-Rp color derived from the spectra.

nexp_used.name: nexp_used
nexp_used.description: Number of exposures used in constructing the visit spectrum.

s2n.name: s2n
s2n.description: Median signal-to-noise ratio per pixel of this visit spectrum.

s2n10.name: s2n10
s2n10.description: Top 10-th percentile signal-to-noise ratio per pixel of this visit spectrum.

badpixfrac.name: badpixfrac
badpixfrac.description: Fraction of bad pixels (those with inverse variance being zero.)

pk.name: pk
pk.description: Primary key. Sequential identifier for this table.
